HGSS.305.0000:
Welcome!
This is the reception for admission.\f
Will you try the Pokéathlon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.305.0001:
Welcome. This is the reception for the
Supreme Cup.\f
Top Pokéathletes are waiting for you.
Would you like to try\r
the challenge? [0200,0000]
HGSS.305.0003:
Which course would you like
to try? [0200,0000]
HGSS.305.0006:
The Pokéathlon will begin right now.
Your team color is red.\f
Good luck!\f
HGSS.305.0011: What would you like to know about? [0200,0000]
HGSS.305.0012:
The Pokéathlon is a sports festival in
which you and three Pokémon compete in\r
three events.\f
The Pokéathlon has a variety of events
to accommodate different aspects\r
of Pokémon.\f
Please come join us with three Pokémon!\f
HGSS.305.0013:
The Supreme Cup is a special course
only for the top Pokéathletes\r
from all over the world.\f
You will earn more points than usual
when you win a Supreme Cup!\f
Please, challenge the
top Pokéathletes!\f
HGSS.305.0014:
The Speed Course consists of three
events that require good\r
Speed Performance.\f
“Hurdle Dash”
Jump over the Hurdles to be\r
number one!\f
“Pennant Capture”
Capture Pennants quickly!\f
“Relay Run”
Show your teamwork!\f
When you win, you will be awarded
the Speed Medal.\f
Choose three Pokémon with good Speed
for these events.\f
HGSS.305.0015:
The Power Course consists of three
events that require good\r
Power Performance.\f
“Block Smash”
Smash all the Blocks!\f
“Circle Push”
Push them out while you stay in!\f
“Goal Roll”
Drive them out and roll the balls\r
toward the Goal!\f
When you win, you will be awarded
the Power Medal.\f
Choose three Pokémon with good Power
for these events.\f
HGSS.305.0016:
The Stamina Course consists of three
events that require good\r
Stamina Performance.\f
“Ring Drop”
Blow them away and stay on the Ring!\f
“Relay Run”
The Stamina of all three is key!\f
“Block Smash”\r
Smash away as long as your
Stamina holds!\f
When you win, you will be awarded
the Stamina Medal.\f
Choose three Pokémon with good Stamina
for these events.\f
HGSS.305.0017:
The Jump Course consists of three
events that require good\r
Jump Performance.\f
“Lamp Jump”
Jump to the sky and hit Lamps!\f
“Disc Catch”
Jump and catch flying Discs!\f
“Hurdle Dash”
Jump over the Hurdles cleanly!\f
When you win, you will be awarded
the Jump Medal.\f
Choose three Pokémon with good Jump
for these events.\f
HGSS.305.0018:
The Skill Course consists of three
events that require good\r
Technique Performance.\f
“Snow Throw”
Aim for them and throw Snow!\f
“Goal Roll”
Roll the balls into the Goal!\f
“Pennant Capture”
Make a quick turn and grab Pennants!\f
When you win, you will be awarded
the Skill Medal.\f
Choose three Pokémon with good Skill
for these events.\f
HGSS.305.0019:
Good job!\f
You will receive Athlete Points
based on your score.\f
HGSS.305.0022:
For winning these events,
you will be awarded\r
another [0134,0002,0000] points.\f
HGSS.305.0023:
Considering the performance this time,
Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000] will be\r
permitted to go to the “Trust” room.\r
Congratulations!\f
HGSS.305.0024:
Considering the performance this time,
Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000] will be\r
permitted to go to the\r
“Potential” room.\r
Congratulations!\f
HGSS.305.0025:
Considering the performance this time,
Pokéathlete [0103,0000,0000] will be\r
permitted to go to the\r
“Friendship” room.\r
Congratulations!\f
HGSS.305.0026:
Welcome.
This is the reception for the\r
Link Pokéathlon.\f
You can compete with your friends
on the same course.\f
Would you like to try it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.305.0027:
Please decide which of you
will become the group leader.\f
The other players must then choose
“JOIN GROUP.” [0200,0000]
HGSS.305.0028:
DS Wireless Communications will
be launched. [0200,0000]
HGSS.305.0029:
Communication error.\f
Please repeat the registration
process from the beginning.
HGSS.305.0030:
Entering [0401,0003,0000].
Your team color is red.
HGSS.305.0031:
Entering [0401,0003,0000].
Your team color is blue.
HGSS.305.0032:
Entering [0401,0003,0000].
Your team color is green.
HGSS.305.0033:
Entering [0401,0003,0000].
Your team color is yellow.
HGSS.305.0034:
Furthermore, you will be awarded a
runner-up bonus of [0134,0002,0000] points.\f
HGSS.305.0037:
Oh no! It seems like you don’t have
enough Pokémon.\f
In order to participate in the
Pokéathlon, you need to have\r
at least three Pokémon.\f
The Pokéathlon brings together all
kinds of Pokémon from all over.\f
The more, the merrier! Please, bring a
bunch of Pokémon and you’ll see.
HGSS.305.0038:
Welcome. This is the reception for the
Link Pokéathlon.\f
Oh, my!
This is your first time, isn’t it?\f
If that’s true, then please head over
to the “Single” reception.\f
If you go to the right from here, it’s
the middle counter.\f
You can get information about the
Pokéathlon and decide on a course.
HGSS.305.0039:
The Link Pokéathlon is a sport festival
in which you join with three of your\r
Pokémon to compete in four events.\f
Your friends can join the same events
to compete.\f
The Pokéathlon has a variety of events
to accommodate many of the different\r
aspects of Pokémon.\f
Please bring your friends to the
Link Pokéathlon.\f
HGSS.305.0040:
The Speed & Jump Course consists of
four events that require good\r
Speed and Jump Performance.\f
“Hurdle Dash”
Jump over the Hurdles to be\r
number one!\f
“Lamp Jump”
Take the Lamps quickly!\f
“Disc Catch”
Catch the Discs rapidly!\f
“Relay Run”
Superb Speed is highly required!\f
When you win, you will be awarded
the Speed Medal and the Jump Medal.\f
Choose three Pokémon with good
Speed and Jump for these events, and\r
bring your friends as well.\f
HGSS.305.0041:
The Jump & Skill Course consists of
four events that require good\r
Jump and Skill Performance.\f
“Lamp Jump”
Show your skill in jumping to\r
touch the Lamps!\f
“Disc Catch”
Jump and catch the Discs!\f
“Pennant Capture”
Show your moves and collect Pennants!\f
“Snow Throw”
Aim with accuracy!\f
When you win, you will be awarded
the Jump Medal and the Skill Medal.\f
Choose three Pokémon with good
Jump and Skill for these events, and\r
bring your friends as well.\f
HGSS.305.0042:
The Skill & Power Course consists of
four events that require good\r
Skill and Power Performance.\f
“Goal Roll”
Aim at the Goal and shoot!\f
“Snow Throw”
Steady, aim, and fire away!\f
“Pennant Capture”
Show your moves and collect Pennants!\f
“Block Smash”
Blocks keep coming! Smash them all!\f
When you win, you will be awarded
the Skill Medal and the Power Medal.\f
Choose three Pokémon with good
Skill and Power for these events, and\r
bring your friends as well.\f
HGSS.305.0043:
The Power & Stamina Course consists
of four events that require good\r
Power and Stamina Performance.\f
“Block Smash”
Blocks keep coming! Smash them all!\f
“Circle Push”
Push them away and stay in the Circle!\f
“Goal Roll”
Keep rolling until your energy\r
runs out!\f
“Ring Drop”
Drop them off the Ring and stay on top!\f
When you win, you will be awarded
the Power Medal and the Stamina Medal.\f
Choose three Pokémon with good
Power and Stamina for these events,\r
and bring your friends as well.\f
HGSS.305.0044:
The Stamina & Speed Course consists
of four events that require good\r
Stamina and Speed Performance.\f
“Relay Run”
Both Stamina and Speed are key!\f
“Ring Drop”
Drop them from high while you survive!\f
“Hurdle Dash”
Over you go! Aim for number one!\f
“Circle Push”
Push them away and stay in the Circle!\f
When you win, you will be awarded
the Stamina Medal and the Speed Medal.\f
Choose three Pokémon with good Stamina
and Speed for these events, and\r
bring your friends as well.\f
HGSS.305.0045:
The Master Course is a difficult course
that offers different events\r
every time.\f
Teams must do their best to get
through the course, no matter what it\r
may be!\f
You won’t receive any medals for a
Master Course.\f
However, you will receive twice as many
Athlete Points.\f
By all means, get your friends together
and give it a try.\f
HGSS.305.0047:
This time, [0103,0000,0000]’s score was
[0134,0001,0000]!\f
Since it was on a Master Course,
[0135,0002,0000] points were earned!\f
